article.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
article.summary: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

headline: Ethereum Upgrade: 6 Key Reforms Unveiled by Buterin

article.title: Vitalik Buterin shares top priorities for new 'Lean Ethereum' strawmap
article.summary: Part of the Ethereum Foundation’s plan to make Ethereum more private and scalable is to introduce a new virtual machine, with leanISA and RISC-V among the top candidates.

headline: Hormuz Traffic Plunges 20% Amid Shipping Route Shift

article.title: Fewer Ships Transiting Hormuz Along Oman Coast After U-Turns
article.summary: The number of vessels sailing through the Strait of Hormuz along the Omani coast fell to a trickle on Sunday, a day after several exiting along that route made sharp reversals, underscoring Iran’s continued efforts to maintain its grip on the waterway.

headline: India Biofuel Stocks Drop 5% Amid Motorist Backlash

article.title: Modi’s Biofuel Push Comes Under Pressure as Motorists Protest
article.summary: Indian motorists will gather in New Delhi on Sunday, in the first major protest against a flagship biofuel program intended to reduce crude imports and support farm incomes.

headline: Bitcoin Surges Toward $53K Amid Volatility Spike

article.title: Bitcoin to $53K? Exchange Deposits Jump as Analysts Warn of Increased Volatility
article.summary: Bitcoin bounced back above $60,000 this week, but increased volatility might be on the way as crypto deposits to exchanges spike.

article.summary: Hyperliquid ETFs took in $4.3 million, their smallest week since launching in May, down from a record $111 million the week before.

headline: Trump Coin Investors Lose $3.81 Billion Overnight
